item.title: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.3.37
item.description:
Product: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.3.37
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 20:45:42 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Drivers and UI for Krohn-Hite 7008 multichannel amplifiers.

Release Notes: - build with LV-Data-PGSQL/3.12.3.17
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Cryostation v1.4.4.15
item.description:
Product: Cryostation v1.4.4.15
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 20:22:21 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Program for logging Montana Instruments Cryostation status to the SQL DB. Provides a UI and API for getting information from the Cryostation.

Release Notes: - build with LV-Data-PGSQL/3.12.3.17
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.3.36

Description: Drivers and UI for Krohn-Hite 7008 multichannel amplifiers.

Release Notes:

item.title: Cryostation v1.4.4.14

Product: Cryostation v1.4.4.14

Release Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 18:47:09 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Program for logging Montana Instruments Cryostation status to the SQL DB. Provides a UI and API for getting information from the Cryostation.

item.title: Razorbill RP100 v2.2.5.18
item.description:
Product: Razorbill RP100 v2.2.5.18
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 18:08:51 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Drivers for Razorbill RP100 HV amplifier

Release Notes: - build with LV-Data-PGSQL/3.12.3.17
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.12.1.31
item.description:
Product: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.12.1.31
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 18:08:51 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Monitor and Control application inheritng from Instrument Framework and SMO
- Log instrument status to the PGSQL database.
- UI and API for controlling magnet field, temperature, and rotator angle (PPMS2 only)

Release Notes: - build with LV-Data-PGSQL/3.12.3.17
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.3.17
item.description:
Product: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.3.17
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 17:29:37 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: - Database management and Selects and Insert macros to PostgreSQL/timescaleDB.


Release Notes: [3.12.3]
#133: Change INSERTs to NOT query time column format
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Database Viewer v2026.5.18.11
item.description:
Product: Database Viewer v2026.5.18.11
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 18 May 2026 14:14:31 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin, Jack Maier, Yun-Yi Pai

Description: Visualize data from database (postgres/timescale)

Release Notes: - build with pgsql/3.12.2.16 (timestamp fix)
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Database Viewer v2026.5.18.10

item.title: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.2.16
item.description:
Product: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.2.16
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 18 May 2026 13:32:48 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: - Database management and Selects and Insert macros to PostgreSQL/timescaleDB.


Release Notes: [3.12.2]
#132 Fix conversion postgres timestamp to labview timestamp
item.dc:creator: LevyLab
